title: Open the ACB System Overview Screen in the System HMI
summary: Navigate in the System HMI to the ACB System overview screen using the documented menu path: SMALLS > ACB > ACB1 - AMT TT.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to open the ACB System overview screen in the System HMI to view the tilt-tray system layout and color-coded status information.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the documented HMI navigation steps to open the ACB System overview screen.

visual_references.description: System HMI screen associated with the SMALLS navigation context.
Screen artifact associated with the ACB System overview screen showing system status information.
Figure showing the ACB System Overview interface.
Legend for interpreting indicators on the ACB System Overview screen.

steps.title: Press SMALLS on the System HMI
steps.purpose: Begin the documented navigation path to the ACB System overview screen.
steps.expected_result: The HMI enters the SMALLS navigation context used to access the ACB menu path.
steps.healthy_condition: The SMALLS selection is available and responds on the System HMI.
steps.failure_condition: The SMALLS option is not present or does not respond as documented.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference the SMALLS-related System HMI screen context.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the documented menu options are not present.
Escalate if the System HMI does not match the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access the "ACB System" overview screen, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.

steps.title: Select ACB from the drop-down menu
steps.purpose: Choose the documented subsystem menu needed to reach the ACB System overview screen.
steps.expected_result: The ACB option is selected from the available menu choices.
steps.healthy_condition: The drop-down menu includes "ACB" and it can be selected.
steps.failure_condition: The "ACB" option is missing or cannot be selected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the SMALLS-related HMI context while locating the drop-down menu path.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the documented menu options are not present.
Escalate if the System HMI does not match the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access the "ACB System" overview screen, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.

steps.title: Select ACB1 - AMT TT
steps.purpose: Open the specific ACB system option identified by the source.
steps.instruction: Select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the available options.
steps.expected_result: The HMI opens the ACB1 - AMT TT selection associated with the ACB System overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The "ACB1 - AMT TT" option is available and selectable.
steps.failure_condition: The "ACB1 - AMT TT" option is not present or does not open as described.

actions.label: Select ACB1 - AMT TT
actions.exact_action: Select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the available options.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference the ACB System overview screen associated with the ACB1 - AMT TT selection.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the documented menu options are not present.
Escalate if the System HMI does not match the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access the "ACB System" overview screen, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.

steps.title: Verify the ACB System overview screen is displayed
steps.purpose: Confirm that the documented navigation reached the intended System HMI screen.
steps.instruction: Verify that the ACB System overview screen is displayed.
steps.expected_result: The ACB System overview screen is open in the System HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed screen shows the ACB System overview with tilt-tray system layout and color-coded status information for bins.
steps.failure_condition: The expected ACB System overview screen does not appear or the displayed screen does not match the documented screen.

actions.label: Confirm ACB overview screen
actions.exact_action: Verify that the ACB System overview screen is displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Compare the displayed screen to the ACB System overview screen showing system status information.
Use the figure as a reference for the ACB System Overview interface.
Use the legend to interpret indicators shown on the ACB System overview display.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the screen does not open as described.
Escalate if the System HMI does not match the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access the "ACB System" overview screen, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.
The ACB System overview screen shows the tilt-tray system layout and a color-coded status of each bin.

success_criteria: The ACB System overview screen is open in the System HMI.
The displayed screen matches the documented ACB System overview screen.
The screen shows the tilt-tray system layout and color-coded status information.
healthy_conditions: The System HMI presents the documented navigation path: SMALLS > ACB > ACB1 - AMT TT.
The ACB System overview screen displays as expected.
The overview screen shows color-coded status information for the system.
failure_conditions: The SMALLS option is not present or does not respond.
The ACB drop-down option is not present.
The ACB1 - AMT TT option is not available.
The ACB System overview screen does not open as described.
The System HMI does not match the documented navigation path.
escalation_guidance: Stop if the documented menu options are not present or the screen does not open as described.
Escalate if the System HMI does not match the documented navigation path.
